examples: He was not slothful: he had been busy all night.
They considered being lazy or slothful one of the seven deadly SINS.
For us, the slothful spell was broken on our second afternoon by a shrill whistle.
Slothful medical suppliers will suffer from these cuts, but the smarter ones are spotting new opportunities.
Slothful member states are told by Berlin to trim their spending and raise their taxes.
